data.name: I Have Known You
data.detailed_description:
I Have Known You is a visual novel where you play as the main protagonist returning to your hometown, Wildflower.

But when you arrive, the town where you grew up doesn’t feel the same anymore.

Old friendships have changed. New faces hide old wounds. And memories you tried to forget begin to resurface, some sweet, some painful, and some you can’t quite explain.

You came back hoping for peace… but instead, you find yourself caught between love, guilt, and a past that refuses to die. Every choice pulls you deeper into the tangled lives of those around you and into the secrets this quiet coastal town has been hiding for generations.

Wildflower looks peaceful from the outside; cozy cafés, familiar streets, and the scent of forest. But behind the small-town smiles, there’s a sense that something isn’t quite right. People talk in half-truths. Names are forgotten.

The town seems to remember you; and sometimes, it feels like it’s watching. The deeper you dig, the clearer it becomes: Wildflower keeps its own history, and everyone who lives here carries a piece of it.

Centuries ago, a woman named Agnes lived on these shores; a healer, a lover, a woman accused of witchcraft. They said she bewitched men, that she could bend desire and fate with a single touch. They burned her at the stake… but she never truly left. Now, her story lingers; whispered between generations, told as a warning, or as a promise.

Some believe that her spirit walks again, moving through the hearts of those who dare to love too deeply.
And as you uncover the truth about Agnes, you might realize that her legend and your life are more connected than you ever imagined.

Not every love story begins with a kiss; some begin with regret. I Have Known You is a story-driven visual novel where romance isn’t just about attraction; it’s about healing, forgiveness, and the scars that never fully fade.

Whether it’s a rekindled friendship, a forbidden affair, or something that feels almost supernatural, your choices will decide what kind of love story you create and what kind of person you become when it ends.

  • Visual Novel in which you navigate the story

  • Play as the protagonist, a man returning to Wildflower…

  • Customize the protagonist’s name and shape his personality through your choices

  • Experience a branching narrative filled with romance, drama, and mystery

  • Reconnect with childhood friends, old flames, and new faces in Wildflower

  • Navigate relationships that can turn into friendship, love… or betrayal

  • Explore a town haunted by memories and whispers of witchcraft

  • Uncover secrets through interactive choices with lasting impact

  • Shape the outcome with multiple paths and decisions that carry weight into the full game

WARNING
This game features adult content and mature themes that some players may find sensitive or offensive. Player discretion is advised.

data.short_description: The main character returns to his hometown - a place with a dark past, where a witch hunt took place 300 years ago. As you reconnect with old friends, the legend begins to awaken once more.

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統
  • 作業系統: Windows 10 or higher
  • 處理器: 2.0 GHz Core 2 Duo
  • 記憶體: 2 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: OpenGL 2.0 or DirectX 9.0c compatible
  • 儲存空間: 4 GB 可用空間
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統

mac_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: OS X Yosemite 10.10
  • 記憶體: 2 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: OpenGL 2, DirectX 9, OpenGL ES 2 or WebGL
  • 儲存空間: 4 GB 可用空間

linux_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Ubuntu 12.04+ or Kernel 3.x+ based distributions
  • 處理器: 2.0 GHz Core 2 Duo
  • 記憶體: 2 MB 記憶體
  • 儲存空間: 4 GB 可用空間

pc_requirements.minimum:
Minimum:
  • Requires a 64-bit processor and operating system
  • OS: Windows 10 or higher
  • Processor: 2.0 GHz Core 2 Duo
  • Memory: 2 GB RAM
  • Graphics: OpenGL 2.0 or DirectX 9.0c compatible
  • Storage: 4 GB available space
pc_requirements.recommended:
Recommended:
  • Requires a 64-bit processor and operating system

mac_requirements.minimum:
Minimum:
  • OS: OS X Yosemite 10.10
  • Memory: 2 GB RAM
  • Graphics: OpenGL 2, DirectX 9, OpenGL ES 2 or WebGL
  • Storage: 4 GB available space

linux_requirements.minimum:
